We are a team of passionate wedding enth: We are a team of passionate wedding enthusiasts dedicated to making your special day absolutely perfect. With over 5 years of experience, we've helped hundreds of couples realize their dream weddings.

Crafting unforgettable moments since 202: Crafting unforgettable moments since 2020. We believe every love story is unique and deserves a celebration that reflects its beauty.
What started as a small boutique for wed: What started as a small boutique for wedding invitations has grown into a full-service wedding planning and supply destination. Our mission is to simplify the wedding planning process while ensuring the highest quality and attention to detail.
We work with the best vendors and design: We work with the best vendors and designers to bring you exclusive collections and services that you won't find anywhere else.
Every detail is meticulously crafted to: Every detail is meticulously crafted to ensure your wedding looks as beautiful as you imagined.
We value your time and trust. We guarant: We value your time and trust. We guarantee on-time delivery and professional service for every event.
Your wedding should be personal. We offe: Your wedding should be personal. We offer custom packages tailored specifically to your needs and budget.
Custom-designed wedding invitations to s: Custom-designed wedding invitations to set the tone for your big day. Choose from elegant printed cards or modern digital invitations.
Beautiful venue and floral decorations t: Beautiful venue and floral decorations tailored to your wedding theme. From minimalist setups to luxurious ballroom designs.
Capture every special moment with profes: Capture every special moment with professional photographers. High-quality editing and cinematic shots to preserve memories forever.
Professional wedding films that tell the: Professional wedding films that tell the story of your big day. Includes cinematic highlights and full ceremony recordings.

Landing Hero Title: Design a celebration your guests will remember
Landing Hero Accent: from the first invitation to the final toast.
Landing Hero Description: A refined wedding event platform for showcasing your story, guiding guests, and managing every meaningful detail with confidence.
Landing Story Title: Built for elegant wedding events with modern flow
Landing Story Description: Present your couple story, highlight the event details, and guide guests into RSVPs or service discovery through a cleaner, more premium entry point.
Landing Quote: Every wedding deserves a calm, beautiful digital first impression before guests enter the full experience.
Landing Feature One Description: Welcome visitors with a premium first screen before they continue into your event pages and services.
Landing Feature Two Description: Let guests choose English or Khmer directly on the landing page before exploring the site.
Landing Feature Three Description: Move visitors from inspiration to action with direct paths to the main site, services, and admin access.
Landing Section Planner Title: A simpler path for couples and guests
Landing Section Planner Description: Use the landing page as a calm starting point, then move into the full wedding site for event details, invitations, and guest management.
Landing Step One Description: Introduce the event clearly so guests understand the celebration before navigating deeper.
Landing Step Two Description: Guide guests into an invitation-style experience with RSVP context and essential event details.
Landing Step Three Description: Continue into the main site to manage services, contact pages, and the admin event workflow.
Landing Form Title: Preview a simple RSVP-style invitation form
Landing Form Helper: A lightweight section for guest-friendly interaction on the landing page.
Landing Form Message Placeholder: Write a note or blessing message
Landing Form Footnote: This section gives guests a simple preview before they continue into the full wedding experience.
Landing Form Success: Invitation preview captured. Continue to the main site for the full guest experience.
